popularStory.headline: Henry Percy (Hotspur)
popularStory.description: Sir Henry Percy KG (20 May 1364 – 21 July 1403), commonly known as Sir Harry Hotspur, or simply Hotspur, was a late medieval English nobleman. He was known as one of the most valiant knight …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys於1371年2月12日出生在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可時，她的父親Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March19歲，母親Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster15歲。她於1379年12月10日與Sir Henry Percy在威爾士蒙姆爾武斯可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年4月20日在英國素可特洛頓享年46歲，埋葬在英國素可特洛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys于1371年2月12日出生在威尔士蒙姆爾武斯可时，她的父亲Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March19岁，母亲Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster15岁。她于1379年12月10日与Sir Henry Percy在威尔士蒙姆爾武斯可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年4月20日在英国素可特洛頓享年46岁，埋葬在英国素可特洛頓。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys was born on 12 February 1371, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, was 19 and her mother, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, was 15. She married Sir Henry Percy on 10 December 1379, in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 20 April 1417, in Trotton, Sussex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Trotton, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys est née le 12 février 1371, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Percy le 10 décembre 1379, à Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 avril 1417, à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Trotton, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys am 12. Februar 1371 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March 19 und ihre Mutter Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster 15. Sie hat am 10. Dezember 1379 in Usk, Monmouthshire, Wales Sir Henry Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. April 1417 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Trotton, Sussex, England und wurde in Trotton, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys è nata il il 12 febbraio 1371 nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Percy il 10 dicembre 1379, nel Usk, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 aprile 1417, nel Trotton, Sussex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Trotton, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoysが1371年2月12日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクで生まれた時，父Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of Marchは19歳，母Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulsterは15歳であった。1379年12月10日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアウスクでSir Henry Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年4月20日にイギリススセックストロットオンで46歳で死去し，イギリススセックストロットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys(이)가 1371년 2월 12일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1379년 12월 10일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 스크에서 Sir Henry Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 4월 20일 영국 수세스 트로턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 트로턴에 묻혔다.

mn.12 February 1371–20 April 1417: 1371 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 12–1417 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 20

pt.12 February 1371–20 April 1417: 12 de fevereiro de 1371–20 de abril de 1417
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys nasceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1371, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Percy em 10 de dezembro de 1379, em Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de abril de 1417, em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys родилась 12 февраля 1371 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Percy 10 декабря 1379 г. в местности уск, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 апреля 1417 г. в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности троттон, суссекс, Англия.

es.12 February 1371–20 April 1417: 12 de febrero de 1371–20 de abril de 1417
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys nació el 12 de febrero de 1371, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Edmund Mortimer 3rd Earl of March, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Philippa of Clarence 5th Countess of Ulster, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir Henry Percy el 10 de diciembre de 1379, en Usk, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de abril de 1417, en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Trotton, Sussex, Inglaterra.
